// 01 — ABOUT

Who I Am

I'm a cybersecurity professional based in Phnom Penh, Cambodia, currently working as a SOC Assistant at Sathapana Bank PLC. I hold a Bachelor of Science in Information and Communications Technology from the American University of Phnom Penh (2025).

My passion lies at the intersection of offensive security, digital forensics, and threat intelligence. As a Certified Ethical Hacker (CEH), I combine strategic thinking with hands-on technical skills to identify, analyze, and neutralize threats.

I believe that technology isn't just about building systems — it's about building connections, trust, and a better future for everyone.

"Technology isn't just about building systems; about building connections, trust, and a better future for everyone."

// 06 — VISION

Career Roadmap

Phase 01 · 0–1 Year
Deep Technical Mastery
  • Strengthen incident response & threat detection
  • Master SIEM, IDS/IPS, threat hunting techniques
  • Practice pentesting in lab environments
  • Python automation for security workflows
Phase 02 · 1–3 Years
Security Engineer
  • Advance to Cybersecurity Analyst / Security Engineer
  • Lead vulnerability assessments and pentesting
  • Specialize in malware analysis & threat intel
  • Build and operate a personal cyber lab
Phase 03 · 3–5 Years
Technical Lead
  • AI security and OT/IoT security specialization
  • Lead major incident response operations
  • Design and secure enterprise systems
  • Establish authority as digital investigator
